chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 5867 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 24625/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2026 Mr. Sarmad Aziz, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Saifurrehman, Advocate for Respondnet. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- The case of the Petitioner is that it has applied for affiliation with Pakistan Sports Board, but its application has not been properly attended to and processed. Under such circumstances, we deem it fit and proper to dispose of this Petition with the directions to Pakistan Sports Board to decide the Application of the Petitioner through a Speaking Order after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and all concerned, without undue delay, preferably within a period of 30 days from today. Judge Judge Ayaz
